REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ALEX MICHEL'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SPECIFICALLY PLEAD THE FRAUD CLAIM AND FAILED TO STATE THE MANNER IN WHICH THE COMPLAINT COULD BE AMENDED AND HOW THAT AMENDMENT WILL CHANGE THE LEGAL EFFECT OF THE PLEADING. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF LEAVE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT BY DECEMBER 1, 2017. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: LYNN O'MALLEY TAYLOR, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: CAROL HARABURDA, CSR 8052, (TEL: 925.360.6065)

Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Continued To Feb-21-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Advanced From Dec-01-17 To Nov-27-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ALEX MICHEL'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearances: Stephen L. Collier of the Tenderloin Housing Clinic (415.771.9850) for defendant and moving party; Emily L. Brough of Zacks Freedman & Patterson (415.956.8100) for plaintiff and opposing party.

Argued and the Court rules as follows: SUSTAINED. Plaintiff failed to specifically plead the fraud claim and failed to state the manner in which the complaint could be amended and how that amendment will change the legal effect of the pleading. The Court grants Plaintiff leave to amend the complaint by December 1, 2017. Order signed. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Carol Haraburda, CSR 8052, (Tel: 925.360.6065)(501/LOT)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2017 Continued To Dec-01-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALEX MICHEL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to December 1, 2017. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than November 9, 2017 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2017 Continued To Nov-07-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
